items.name: Rabbit-Eared Magician Hat – Ace of Hearts
items.description:
Ladies and gentlemen… keep your eyes on the hat.
No mirrors. No strings. No secrets revealed.

A snap of the fingers — the brim casts a shadow.
A heartbeat later, rabbit ears pierce through the darkness.
A single card glides forward… the Ace of Hearts.

But here’s the real trick —
the magic was never inside the hat.

It was you all along.

Now take the stage.
